summary: Iteration-2 backend + frontend testing. 18/19 new iteration-2 backend tests pass and 23/23 iteration-1 regression tests still pass (total 41/42). All new UI data-testids are present: products filters & track toggles, product detail hero + history range buttons + detail-track-toggle + empty-history banner, /labels page Run Now queues a job (history row appears), /settings page has all inputs + toggles + run-now buttons, /jobs page shows TYPE filter pills and LABEL badge/'Label Download job' text. Login and Sign out work. Two real bugs found: (1) /api/products list returns image=null for existing products aeop5q/8sa1ay because the list handler does not fall back to review media like the detail handler does; (2) Product detail page hero has empty src even though /api/products/{pid} returns a valid image URL — frontend is binding to the wrong field.

critical.issue: Returns image=null for both existing products (aeop5q, 8sa1ay). Spec requires 'image derived from review media if no product_image_*'. server.py:480 uses `d.get('product_image_thumb_url') or d.get('product_image_large_url')` only — no review-media fallback — AND the query uses projection `{"reviews": 0}` so even adding fallback logic there wouldn't find reviews. Fix: either include a $project that yields first review media image at aggregation time, or drop `reviews: 0` when those fields are absent, or replicate the pick_product_image logic using the first review-media doc (a small $lookup or separate find).

ui_bugs.issue: No row images render (0 tags found in table rows) because /api/products returns image=null — downstream of the backend list bug above.

exists but src attribute is empty/null. Backend /api/products/aeop5q correctly returns image=, so the JSX is almost certainly bound to `product.product_image_large_url` (which is null for existing products) instead of `product.image`. Fix: use `product.image || product.product_image_large_url`.

Still lists both 'Label Auto-Download' and 'Profit/Loss' under FUTURE MODULES. Review request explicitly says FUTURE MODULES should now only show 'Profit/Loss' (Label Download was moved to AUTOMATION section).

action_items: Fix /api/products list handler to populate `image` via review-media fallback for products missing product_image_*_url (matches pick_product_image used by detail endpoint).
Fix ProductDetailPage hero to use `product.image` (falls back correctly on backend) instead of `product.product_image_large_url`.
Remove 'Label Auto-Download' from FUTURE MODULES in Sidebar.js — per spec only 'Profit/Loss' should remain there (the live 'Label Download' is already in AUTOMATION).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_products uses projection {reviews: 0} AND does not call pick_product_image — this is the root cause of image=null in the list response. Consider making image derivation a first-class field computed & persisted on scrape, or do a lightweight second pass that only pulls `reviews.$[0].media` for rows missing product_image_*.
HHMM_RE is good; settings PUT correctly rejects 25:00 and 'abc' with 400.
Scheduler idempotency works: a second run-now?what=scrape did not create duplicate pending jobs for aeop5q. Good.
`/api/health` was moved above app.include_router(api) — iteration-1 bug is fixed. 200 OK verified.
label_run_now idempotency verified: second call returns already_queued:true with same id.
Minor: put_settings calls `get_settings(user)` which requires a user dependency — works but couples the helper tightly to auth. Could refactor to return a plain dict.
No auth brute-force protection on /api/auth/login (still carried over from iter-1; acceptable for single-admin preview).

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows + testids work; 2 image-related bugs)

seed_data_creation: During tests: briefly toggled aeop5q tracked off/on (restored to ON before test ended), created and deleted a few transient product_scrape and label_download jobs (all cleaned up in test teardown), briefly changed settings (11:30 / 09:45, label_enabled true/false) — restored to defaults (scrape_time=11:00, scrape_enabled=true, label_time=09:30, label_enabled=false) via restore_settings session fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run both: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py -v`. The restore_settings fixture at module scope restores schedule settings to defaults after the iter2 suite finishes. Worker is NOT running in preview, so any scrape/label_download jobs created remain 'pending' — that's expected. When verifying image fixes: check both GET /api/products?limit=5 (items[*].image must be non-null for aeop5q & 8sa1ay) and the UI hero on /products/aeop5q (should be a meesho review-media URL). The two-product dataset (aeop5q, 8sa1ay) must be preserved in real remote MongoDB.
rca_of_the_issue: BUG 1 (image=null in list): server.py list_products line 480 only checks product_image_thumb_url / product_image_large_url; existing products have neither (they predate the new scraper). The detail handler uses pick_product_image() which falls back to the first review-media URL — the list handler needs the same fallback. Reproduction: `curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer ' BASE/api/products?limit=5` → all items have `image: null`. Mitigation: add review-media fallback OR, more efficiently, have the new scraper write a derived `image` field into each product doc so both endpoints read it directly. BUG 2 (hero src empty): /api/products/aeop5q returns image= but ProductDetailPage renders with src bound to product.product_image_large_url (null). Fix: bind to `product.image`. Both bugs cause the user-visible 'no product thumbnails anywhere' symptom.
